package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_mutates_domain_model_state: Middleware that writes business entities or persistence models as a side effect of request plumbing.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule088NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule088NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule088NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario088Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule088NegativeService, input Rule088NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
